props.heading: Advance Your Nursing Career Onlines
props.subheading: CCNE-accredited programs from Maryville University. 100% online coursework. Clinical placements in your community.

items.title: RN to BSN
items.description: Complete your BSN in as few as 12 months. For licensed RNs ready to advance.

items.title: Accelerated BSN
items.description: Earn your BSN in 16 months with no prior nursing experience required.

items.title: MSN — Family NP
items.description: Become a Family Nurse Practitioner. Diagnose, treat, and manage patient care.

items.title: DNP
items.description: The terminal nursing degree. Lead healthcare systems and shape policy.

testimonials.name: Joe B.
testimonials.quote: Maryville made it possible for me to earn my BSN while working full-time. The online format was flexible but rigorous.

testimonials.name: Tiffany N.
testimonials.quote: Each semester built upon the previous one. The faculty truly cared about my success and were always available.

testimonials.name: Celena S.
testimonials.quote: The clinical placement support was outstanding. I completed all my hours at a site 10 minutes from home.

items.answer: Yes. All of Maryville's nursing programs are accredited by the Commission on Collegiate Nursing Education (CCNE), the gold standard in nursing education accreditation.
items.question: Are Maryville's nursing programs accredited?

items.answer: Yes. All didactic coursework is completed online. MSN and DNP programs include clinical components that you complete locally in your own community with placement support from Maryville.
items.question: Is coursework really 100% online?

items.answer: No. Maryville does not require GRE or entrance exams for any online nursing program.
items.question: Do I need to take the GRE?

items.answer: RN to BSN: 12 months. Accelerated BSN: 16 months. MSN-FNP: 24 months. DNP: 24-36 months. All timelines assume full-time enrollment.
items.question: How long does each program take?

items.answer: Maryville offers scholarships, employer tuition reimbursement partnerships, federal financial aid (FAFSA), and military benefits. Contact an enrollment advisor for a personalized financial plan.
items.question: What financial aid is available?

props.heading: Ready to Start Your Nursing Journey?
props.description: Connect with an enrollment advisor today. No application fees, no pressure — just answers about your next step.
